feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Can not use default value function for Sales Contract type
entry.content: My users need a default value for the Sales Contract Type field when creating a sales contract. Although they have maintained the value in the Default Values settings, the field remains empty when using the Manage Sales Contracts app. Other fields, such as Sales Organization, Distribution Channel, and Division, are working as expected

entry.title: API to GET RFQ PDF using RFQ number in S4 Hana public cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

We have created an Iflow in SAP Integration suite where we are using API_RFQ_PROCESS_SRV to fetch the RFQ data from S4 hana public cloud system. We want to fetch the RFQ PDF using the RFQ number which is not available in this API, unlike for Purchase Order I can fetch using API_PURCHASEORDER_PROCESS_SRV/GetPDF. Kindly suggest the API to fetch the RFQ PDF in Iflow from S4 hana public cloud.

Regards,

Hinal

entry.title: Buy any combination totaling 10 from a group → get 1 free material
entry.content:
Hello SAP Exprts,

If a customer purchases a total quantity of 10 or more units from a defined material group, then 1 unit of a predefined free material should be automatically added to the sales order.

How can this be configured in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2602? If there are alternative approaches—such as customization, APIs, or other methods—please guide me on how to achieve this.

Please refer to the examples provided below.

1. 

A = 10

👉 Total = 10
✔ Free material added

2.

A = 5

B = 5
👉 Total = 10
✔ Free material added

3. 

A = 2

B = 3

C = 5

👉 Total = 10
✔ Free material added

entry.title: Output Parameter Determination Invoice Send To Customer Via Email In SAP S4 HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Community,

Currently we are facing issue as we have mapped output parameter determination in SAP, and written BADI APOC_ADD_EMAIL_RECIPIENTS (OUTPUTCONTROLAPPLOBJECTTYPE SALES_DOCUMENT) with custom logic to achieve the email functionality results, to trigger the 3 emails maintained in Customer Master. But the issue is coming in smart form but as SAP we are integrated with GSP partner E-invoice generated in the system via E-document cockpit 

PDF delivered to customer, but E-invoice QR code and E-invoice number is not coming.

I am attaching the Document which prepared for Output Parameter Determination app in Public Cloud.

Kindly request you to help why the E-invoice QR Code and E-invoice number is not print on smart form. Is there any configuration is missing or anything which we are missing to map.

Kindly check and guide us.

Regards,

Ashish

entry.title: Issue with Bank Statement Processing Rules for Bank Fees
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support Team,

We are currently experiencing an issue with the processing rules configured for bank fees in bank statement uploads.

We have defined an automated rule for our client to enable automatic posting of bank fees during the bank statement import. The rule is set up with the following criteria:

  • Company Code: equal to 4400
  • Memo Line: contains (chinese characters)
  • House Bank: between BOC1 and BOC2
  • House Bank Account: between CNY1 and CNY2
  • House Bank Account: between EUR1 and EUR2
  • House Bank Account: between USD1 and USD2

The posting is configured to GL account 71000000 along with the relevant cost center.

However, we have observed that when the memo line contains the text "BANK CHARGES" (Latin characters), the system correctly posts the bank fees automatically. In contrast, when Chinese characters are used, the automatic posting is not triggered.

Could you please confirm whether processing rules for bank statements support the use of non-Latin (e.g., Chinese) characters in memo lines? Additionally, we would appreciate any guidance on how to enable correct processing in such cases.

Thank you in advance for your support.

Best regards,
Claudia

entry.title: Error in Post Freight Cost Allocation
entry.content:
Hello SAP experts,

I am working with SAP Transportation Management (TM) in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and I have a question about a new charge type in TM has been set up with a valuation category for fuel costs (new charge type in TM, called ZSB0).

This charge type is added to the Freight Order as a cost to determine the charges to be settled with the carrier.

When attempting to post the Freight Cost Allocation, the following error appears:

The error is: Error in the account determination for account key TM1

The account determination is the following:

Thank you for your insights!

entry.title: We cant make transfer in accounts with different currencies
entry.content:
Hello,

The client needs to make an accounting entry between accounts with different currencies, but when doing so, they receive the error message "Page 1 LineItem 1: Postings to account 5750044251 (company code 1000) are only possible in currency USD". How can this be done?

entry.title: Error “Transaction is not defined for copy control 051” in VL02N when adding a sales order
entry.content:
When the order combination flag is turned on in BP, two sales orders, for example Sales Order A and Sales Order B, are created under the same conditions except for the order quantity of the item.

After creating an outbound delivery for Sales Order A as an example, I try to add Sales Order B to the same outbound delivery in VL02N using Add Sales Order. However, the following error message appears:
“The transaction is not defined for copy control 051.”

Please let me know how to resolve this issue.

entry.title: SF EC/ECP Data transformation with Integration with SAP S4/Hana Public cloud
entry.content:
BACKGROUND

We are currently migrating from on-prem ECC system to SAP SuccessFactors EC/ECP and SAP S4 /HANA Public cloud, we are implementing a coupled go-live of SuccessFactors and S/4HANA. AS per SAP’s limitation in S4/Hana Public cloud we have to use the certain default configurations to define our enterprise structure in public cloud. Because of this we can’t define our ECC controlling area in S4 and have to use the controlling are in S4 as A000.

The answer to the key question we are looking get here is whether data transformation within EC and ECP is required, and what SAP's supported approach is for this scenario.

Data specifics - The data which will be held in Employee Central and Employee Central Payroll — references the original controlling area ( from ECC – to ECP for majority of the data that includes – Past payroll results, cost distributions- table ASSHR and ASSOB,  But the data replication from the EC to ECP – updates only infotype 1 with new controlling area). We understand that when payroll data is posted from ECP to S4, the system performs an automatic conversion(We have tested that- we checked that if you modify any historical records lets say cost distribution then system changes its controlling area of teh record to new one). However, this automatic conversion does not address the historical data held within EC and ECP where we have concerns about:

  1. Retro calculations across two controlling areas: Will SAP support retro payroll calculations within ECP that span two different controlling areas (ECC old  and the new A000) without first transforming the historical records held in EC and ECP?
  2. Data integrity within EC and ECP: If historical data within Employee Central and Employee Central Payroll retains references to the old controlling area post-migration, what are the implications for data integrity within the SuccessFactors environment? Specifically, does SAP consider this a supported and clean configuration for a new system going live?
  1. Payroll posting file reconciliation: During our Parallel Payroll Run we will extract, transform, and load data from ECC into EC and ECP, then run payroll in ECP and post the results to S4. If no data transformation is applied within EC/ECP prior to this process, what risk does it have in terms of accuracy and completeness of the payroll posting file posted to S4?
  1. Audit trail and compliance: If we update historical records in EC and ECP to reflect a new controlling area that did not exist when those records were created, what guidance does SAP provide for maintaining an appropriate audit trail?
  2. SAP's recommended approach: What is SAP's recommended approach for ensuring that EC and ECP data are aligned with the new S4 controlling area structure at go-live? Is the transformation of historical data within EC/ECP a supported, recommended activity, and if so, what tooling or methodology does SAP recommend?

entry.title: User wants date range filed in maintenance order cost plan/ actual report.
entry.content: User  wants date range filed in maintenance order cost plan/ actual report, why date range filed not available in the maintenance order cost plan/actual.

entry.title: Maintaining serial numbers during Returns order creation
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am currently working on two customer returns scenarios in SAP S/4HANA public Cloud:

  1. After the goods are returned and inspected, if they are found to be not in acceptable condition, they should be moved to scrap.

  2. After the goods are returned and inspected, if they are in acceptable condition, they should be moved to unrestricted (free) stock.

For both scenarios, I am creating a returns order (document type: CBAR) and selecting the follow-up activity “Receive into Plant.”
With this setting, the stock is posted to blocked stock after goods receipt, and the inspection process is carried out subsequently.

However, I am facing an issue with serial number entry:

  • When using “Receive into Plant,” I do not see an option to enter serial numbers in the returns order.

  • In contrast, when using follow-up activities such as “Immediately Move to Scrap” or “Immediately Move to Specified Stock,” the system triggers an incompleteness log for serial numbers, allowing manual entry at the order level.

I would like to understand:

  • Why does this difference in behavior occur based on the selected follow-up activity?

  • How can serial numbers be captured in the returns order when using “Receive into Plant”?

  • Is there any configuration or standard approach to ensure serial number tracking at the returns order level in this scenario?

Additionally, I noticed that standard APIs for returns order creation seem to support serial number input.
Could you please confirm whether using these APIs would allow creation of returns orders with serial numbers for this scenario?

Thank you for your support.

entry.title: tax net amount not visisble in statutory report
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

we have an issue i have created new tax code of c8 and it is visible all posting when i checked in Create tax return app and amounts as well.

but when i wnated to draw reports in statutory reports for poland as monthly the c8 tax code net amount is not visible at all what could be reason and how to show that tax amount.

entry.title: Need a header condition for sales pricing that do not distributes among items
entry.content:
Hello,

I am working on SAP Public Cloud Edition, and I have created a sales condition type for header level. 

The issue I am facing is that the condition value is being distributed among the items of the sales order/invoice.

How can I add my condition at header level and prevent the value to distribute it to the line items?

This is a screenshot of the condition I've created:

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sales

entry.title: Sales Order Discount and Free Goods Scheme – Public Cloud Feasibility
entry.content:
Hello Community,

Need your support and thoughts for the below requirement On Public Cloud

Sales Order Pricing & Free Goods Requirement

  1. Discount Logic (Quantity 1–9):
    For sales orders with a total quantity between 1 and 9 (across multiple materials (Products)/SKUs), a 5% discount should be applied automatically using condition type ZD01 in the pricing procedure.

 

  1. Free Goods Logic (Quantity-Based Slabs):
  • For order quantities between 10 and 19 (across different SKUs/Products), 1 free good item should be automatically added.
  • If the primary free good is not available in stock, the system should automatically check and allocate the next available substitute material.
  • For order quantities between 20 and 29, 2 free goods should be applied.
  • If the required free goods are not available, the system should similarly check alternative substitutes and allocate them automatically in the sales order.
  • This logic should be applicable for all defined quantity slabs, with automatic substitution based on stock availability.
  1. Scheme Maintenance (Excel Upload):
    An Excel upload functionality should be provided to maintain schemes and free goods data.
    Since these schemes are subject to frequent (weekly) changes, the solution should allow easy updates through bulk upload.

Regards,

Ashish

entry.title: Help Identifying Check-type BAdI for Transaction VF02
entry.content:
Hello!

I am writing to request assistance in identifying a suitable BAdI (Business Add-In) for data validation in the Billing area. I am specifically looking for a “check-type” BAdI that can validate header and item data during the save process in the following environment: Transaction VF02 (Change Billing Document), Program SAPMV60A, Component SD-BIL, within the Billing application area.

Currently, I have explored several BAdIs but have not found one that reliably triggers as a validation before the final commit, allowing error messages to be raised and preventing the document from being saved when validation fails.

Could you please provide the technical name of the recommended BAdI to fulfill this requirement in S/4HANA Cloud? Or any workarounds?

Thank you in advance for your support.

Best regards,

entry.title: Inquiry on Value-Based Automatic Free Goods Determination in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support Team,

We would like to request clarification and guidance regarding the possibility/Scope of value-based automatic free goods determination in SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

Our business requirement is as follows:
When the total net value of a sales order reaches a defined threshold (for example, 10,000 BDT), the customer should automatically receive 1 piece of a free goods item. This free item may either be the same product as ordered or a different material.

We would like to understand:

  • Whether value-based free goods determination is supported in the Public Cloud version
  • If supported, the configuration steps required to achieve this scenario
  • Any available standard functionality, scope items, or recommended workarounds
  • Whether this can be implemented using condition techniques, promotions, or any extensibility options

We would appreciate it if you could provide detailed guidance or relevant documentation to help us implement this requirement.

Thank you for your support.

Regards,
Hasnat

entry.title: MF60 can not generate replenishment with 313 movement type ?
entry.content:
Dear sap,

We want to use 2 steps of  production GI from WM storage location as below:

The warehouse(WM managed storage location) dispatches goods to the production line  stock(non-WM managed storage location) based on the production picking list via MF60.

Our operational steps are as follows:

1. Set the configuration 'Define Control Data for Pull List' with movement 313.

2. Goods replenishment via MF60 with 2 materials, one is from storage location with WM managed, the other is from storage location with non WM managed.

3. When we click 'STAGE', material with WM managed is  successful, it creates the outbound delivery , but the outbound delivery's movement is 411 ?

And the other material with non WM managed, it occurs error： E M7 096 Goods movement not possible with mvmt type 313.

So my question is as below:

1. Why the second material can not be staged with 313 movements?

2. How could i use 2 steps of  production GI from WM storage location?

 

Thanks.

Ying

entry.title: #CoE#QDGG Business function only available on 3SL.
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

could you please provide a list of business function features which is only available on 3SL instead of 2SL.

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud enables user-based authorization control for sales price by products
entry.content:
Dear expert,

Please advise how to implement the following requirements in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud enables user-based authorization control, allowing sales staff to access only sales prices, pricing condition, sales orders and analytics reports of products they are responsible for.

Best regards,

Joey

entry.title: [S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition] Custom Currency Code for Separate Exchange Rate Management - Feasibil
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I have a question regarding currency and exchange rate configuration in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

**Current Situation (ECC)**
- We have two company codes: one in the US and one in Hong Kong
- Both use USD as the document currency
- However, they need to apply different exchange rates for USD→JPY conversion
- In our current ECC system, we created a custom currency code (e.g., "USDA") to manage separate exchange rates for the Hong Kong entity

**Questions for S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition**
I would like to understand the feasibility and best practices for this requirement:

1. **Can we create custom currency codes (like "USDA") in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?**
- Is this supported via standard configuration or key user extensibility?

2. **If custom currency codes are supported, can we maintain separate exchange rate tables for them?**
- Can we configure exchange rates for the custom currency code independently from the standard USD?

3. **Are there any functional limitations or restrictions when using custom currency codes?**
- Are there any standard apps, processes, or integration scenarios that do not support custom currency codes?
- Any known issues with reporting, intercompany transactions, or payment processing?

4. **Is there an alternative standard approach recommended by SAP for this scenario?**
- For example, using different currency types or other configuration options?

Any guidance or documentation references would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance!
